class.name: StringBuilder
class.description: Build Strings more efficiently. Most String manipulations require the constand copying of data (for example when doing concatenations in a for loop). Granted it's not nearly as bas as in most garbage collected languages, here it's mostly unnoticable, but this class can make it a bit more efficient.

method.name: append
method.description: Appends a String to the builder.

method.name: as_string
method.description: Build a single String from all of the appended ones.

method.name: num_strings_appended
method.description: Returns the number of Strings that are appended.
